rationale: Career history consists entirely of marketing, accounting, and operations roles with no engineering or ML experience; works at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Initech), and the advanced GANs skill is entirely unsupported by any technical role.

Built production recommendation features with collaborative filtering and gradient-boosted models at Genpact AI, demonstrating some applied ML work, but only 3.3 years of experience, skills skew heavily toward LangChain and prompt engineering rather than IR/retrieval systems, and lacks evidence of NDCG/ranking evaluation ownership.

Operations Manager and Civil Engineer career at fictional Initech and IT services firms (TCS, Wipro) with no ML or technical engineering work; skills list (Angular, GraphQL, Rust) is inconsistent with the non-technical role history.

Only 3 years of experience in mobile and .NET development at an IT services firm (Tech Mahindra) and fictional Stark Industries, with no ML or AI engineering depth beyond self-learner RAG side projects.

8.8 years SWE experience including Zomato (product company), but all career role descriptions are frontend/React work contradicting the LlamaIndex advanced skill claim, with no evidence of production ML, retrieval, or ranking systems.

Has semantic search listed as advanced skill (56 months) and scikit-learn depth, with a 7.4-year SWE career including Hooli and a product company role, but primary experience is backend/frontend engineering and IT services (HCL, Cognizant) with computer vision as main ML focus rather than IR/ranking systems.
